title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Kiku, Zoro, Unknown person #8 as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A very long time ago,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wano Country was known

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: around the world as the golden country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gold?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pirates craved it! Nobles wanted to rule over it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And He showed his legendary strength by bringing them all down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He showed the world that there are Samurai in Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is even said that he cut down a dragon that appeared in the skies above the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is but one of the legends of Ryuuma the swordsman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: After his death, Ryuuma was enshined

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with his meitou shusui as a sword god! It is a treasure of our people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see. Thanks for the heads up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Too bad none of that really matters to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to have you give Shusui back to me! Somehow things don't feel right if I don't have all three of my swords.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HMPH! So you just want it all to yourself?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shusui is a black blade! It grew to its current state across Ryuuma's many battles!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am asking you if you are the sort of cowardly brat that would lust after such a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Grew?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of @ it, that was actually bugging @ me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, when you say Black Blade, you don't mean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: KyaAah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Help! Someone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wide open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: NGGH 00H!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Can you not hit me when I'm clearly distracted?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Distractions are where victories are born! I am aiming only for openings in your defense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Some- one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Help us! Our lives are in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A woman and a child?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aha Haha Haha Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Ah! A Samurai! OI! Help us!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Mr. swords- Man! Please! Save us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me?! I can't tell if you two are being serious or not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Drip drip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Blood...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Looks like they're not joking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: FW FY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAAH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: NNG 64!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait a minute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
